title: Structured Event Calendar
scenario: Write a prompt that generates a structured event calendar in CSV format with the following columns: Event Name, Date, Time, and Description. The calendar should include at least 5 events, each with a unique name, date, time, and description. The events should be sorted by date in ascending order.
constraints: Must include Event Name, Date, Time, and Description columns
Events should be sorted by date in ascending order

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the CSV file has the required column headers.
Check if the CSV file includes at least 5 events.
Check if the events are sorted by date in ascending order.
Check if the events have unique names, dates, times, and descriptions.
